articles.title: Delivery person falls through a shaft outside Boston’s Omni Parker House
articles.description:
As a result, the Boston Inspectional Department is issuing a building code violation to the hotel.

The post Delivery person falls through a shaft outside Boston’s Omni Parker House appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A delivery person fell through a shaft outside the Omni Parker House in Boston.
The Boston Inspectional Department issued a building code violation to the hotel.
Local residents may face increased safety inspections around the area following this incident.

articles.title: Multiple gunshots fired near Rihanna’s LA home and a woman is taken into custody
articles.description:
No one was injured, police said. It wasn't immediately clear whether the singer was at home when the shooting happened Sunday afternoon.

The post Multiple gunshots fired near Rihanna’s LA home and a woman is taken into custody appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Multiple gunshots were fired near Rihanna's home in LA on Sunday afternoon.
A woman has been taken into custody, but no injuries were reported.
The incident raises concerns about celebrity safety and neighborhood security.

articles.title: Wall Street erases a big loss and closes higher as oil prices fall after surging near $120 a barrel
articles.description:
The Dow Jones Industrial Average clawed back its early plunge of nearly 900 points to rise 261 points, or 0.6%.

The post Wall Street erases a big loss and closes higher as oil prices fall after surging near $120 a barrel appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 261 points after early plunge of nearly 900 points.
Oil prices fell from near $120 a barrel, affecting local gas prices.
Boston residents may see relief at the pump as oil prices stabilize.

articles.title: Authorities say a Georgia teacher was killed in a prank gone wrong. A teen is charged with homicide.
articles.description:
The teacher's family said he knew and loved the five students involved and urged authorities to drop all charges against them.

The post Authorities say a Georgia teacher was killed in a prank gone wrong. A teen is charged with homicide. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A Georgia teacher was killed in a prank gone wrong, impacting local educators.
A teenager has been charged with homicide in connection with the incident.
The teacher's family urges authorities to drop charges against the five involved students.

articles.title: Quincy gas station looking for violist to ‘serenade’ customers
articles.description:

summary: Quincy gas station seeks violist to perform for customers, enhancing local atmosphere.

articles.title: Report: Patriots agree to sign edge rusher Dre’Mont Jones
articles.description:
Jones had 24 QB hits last season, more than anyone on the Patriots.

summary: Patriots sign edge rusher Dre'Mont Jones to strengthen their defense.

This acquisition aims to improve the team's performance in the upcoming season.

articles.title: How a Boston Marathon runner finds purpose in mentoring and miles
articles.description:
Victoria Walker is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Mind Matters Boston.

The post How a Boston Marathon runner finds purpose in mentoring and miles appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Victoria Walker is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support Mind Matters Boston.
She aims to raise awareness for mental health issues affecting local residents.
Walker also mentors youth, fostering community engagement and support in Boston.
